Walkthrough:Pokémon Platinum

From Bulbapedia, the community-driven Pokémon encyclopedia.
(Redirected from Appendix:Platinum walkthrough)
Jump to navigationJump to search
Pokémon Platinum


Pokémon Platinum boxart

Information
Platform(s): Nintendo DS
Part of: Core series
Generation: IV

Main article »

This is an in-depth walkthrough for Pokémon Platinum for the Nintendo DS.
Contents
Main Storyline
Part 1 Introduction, Twinleaf Town, Route 201, Lake Verity, Sandgem Town
Part 2 Route 202, Jubilife City, Route 203, Oreburgh Gate, Oreburgh City, Oreburgh Mine
Part 3 Oreburgh Gym, Jubilife City, Route 204 (south), Ravaged Path, Route 204 (north), Floaroma Town, Floaroma Meadow
Part 4 Valley Windworks, Route 205 (south), Eterna Forest, Route 205 (east), Eterna City, Eterna Gym
Part 5 Eterna City, Old Chateau, Route 206, Wayward Cave, Route 207
Part 6 Mt. Coronet (south), Route 208, Hearthome City, Hearthome Gym, Route 209
Part 7 Solaceon Town, Solaceon Ruins, Lost Tower, Route 210 (south)
Part 8 Route 215, Veilstone City, Veilstone Gym
Part 9 Route 214, Maniac Tunnel, Valor Lakefront, Route 213, Pastoria City
Part 10 Pastoria Gym, Route 212, Valor Lakefront
Part 11 Route 210, Celestic Town, Fuego Ironworks, Route 213
Part 12 Route 219, Route 220, Route 221, Route 218, Canalave City
Part 13 Iron Island, Canalave Gym, Canalave City, Lake Valor
Part 14 Lake Verity, Route 211, Mt. Coronet (north), Route 216, Route 217
Part 15 Acuity Lakefront, Snowpoint City, Snowpoint Gym, Lake Acuity, Veilstone City
Part 16 Mt. Coronet (south)
Part 17 Spear Pillar, Distortion World
Part 18 Sendoff Spring, Lake Verity, Lake Valor, Lake Acuity, Route 222, Sunyshore City
Part 19 Sunyshore Gym, Route 223, Pokémon League (south), Victory Road
Part 20 Pokémon League (north)
Post-Game
Part 21 Twinleaf Town, Sandgem Town, Eterna City, Great Marsh
Part 22 Trophy Garden, Pal Park, Fullmoon Island, Snowpoint Temple, Spear Pillar, Turnback Cave
Part 23 Distortion World, Victory Road, Route 224
Part 24 Fight Area, Route 225, Survival Area, Route 226, Route 227
Part 25 Stark Mountain, Survival Area
Part 26 Stark Mountain, Route 228, Route 229, Resort Area, Route 230

See also

  • Battleground matches
  • Elite Four rematches
  • Catching the Legendary titans
  • Battle Frontier
This article is part of Project Walkthroughs, a Bulbapedia project that aims to write comprehensive step-by-step guides on each Pokémon game.
